stadium.name: The Sinking Field
stadium.description: A notoriously poorly-maintained stadium built on reclaimed marshland. The ground is unstable, often waterlogged, and sections of the stands are known to collapse.

stats.pregame_ritual: Seeing who on the team can belch the loudest.
Meditating silently in the corner of the locker room.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Insisting on being the last player to leave the locker room.
Daring a teammate to eat a live worm.
Thanking their armor for the protection it's about to offer.
Counting the number of clouds in the sky.
Tapping each piece of their armor in a specific sequence.
Insisting on being the last player to leave the locker room.
Singing a sea shanty completely out of tune.
Polishing their boots with bacon grease.

Daring a teammate to eat a live worm.

stadium.name: The Stronghold Bailey
stadium.description: The team plays in the central bailey of Stronghold Castle, a massive fortress built on a plateau overlooking the city. The field is packed earth and cobblestone, and the crowd watches from the surrounding stone ramparts.

stats.pregame_ritual: Leading the team in a synchronized chant that slowly gets louder.
Searching for a four-leaf clover near the sidelines.
Reciting a short, epic poem about a past victory.
Sharing a piece of fermented fish with a teammate.
Listening to the wind for a sign of which way the game will turn.
Eating a piece of honeycomb to 'sweeten' their victory.
Collecting a pebble from every field they've ever played on.
Tugging on their left earlobe three times.
Seeing who on the team can belch the loudest.
Tying a red string around their pinky finger.
Sharing a piece of fermented fish with a teammate.

preGame: HELLO, SPORTS FANS OF OSTERRA! Welcome back to Tuesday Night Trollball, where the blood runs hot and the leather head flies faster than the arrows of a Sky-Archer! Folks, this isn't just another scrap in the muck—this is the Grand Finals Bracket Reset! The fate of the season hangs in the balance as **The New Ravenfall Commanders** descend upon the demonic hallowed ground of **The Sinking Field** to challenge the mighty, magnificent, and utterly dominant **The Ebon Gate Corruptors**! The atmosphere here in **Ebon Gate** is positively crackling, fueled by a throng of fans whose enthusiasm rivals the fiery pits beneath **Lord Orzalon**’s fortress! The **Ebon Gate Corruptors** are the titans of the tournament, a team sponsored by the very Lord of Darkness himself, and they look ready to crush any challenger underfoot! Meanwhile, the **Ravenfall Commanders**, backed by the roar of their devoted following, are ready to prove they belong in the upper echelon! We hear that **Hooge Imtiaz**, the formidable Healer for the **Commanders**, is leading her squad in a thunderous, synchronized chant, building the pressure right before kickoff! But look over at the **Corruptors**! There’s **Simsar Carrelli** of **The Ebon Gate Corruptors**, meticulously counting every single cloud in the dismal Osterran sky, a sign that his team is destined for glorious, foul-smelling victory! And what a battlefield awaits these warriors! The field itself, known as **The Sinking Field**, is a treacherous expanse of thick, clinging muck, punctuated by noxious, sulfurous fumes that drift up like the breath of a slumbering earth dragon! The mud is a menace, the fumes are a poison, and the ground is a sinkhole of death—but the players, they thrive on such brutality! Will **The New Ravenfall Commanders** bring their thunderous skill to shatter the **Corruptors**' iron reign, or will the **Ebon Gate Corruptors** simply drag them down into the mire? Stay glued to your screens, good citizens, because tonight, the glory belongs to the vicious, the brave, and the best! And if **The Haven Lights** try to sneak in here, they’ll be swallowed by the mud before they can even wave!
postGame: WOO-HOO! What a spectacle! What a savage, soul-tearing display of fantasy sport prowess here at **The Sinking Field**! The dust, the gore, the cloying smell of the toxic fumes—it all served only to highlight the sheer, unbridled violence of this contest! **The Ebon Gate Corruptors** have done it! They have weathered the muck and the mayhem to seize victory over **The New Ravenfall Commanders**! The final, glorious tally stands at **The Ebon Gate Corruptors** three points to **The New Ravenfall Commanders** two! The **Corruptors** prevail! The **Ravenfall Commanders** fought valiantly, but they simply could not withstand the inferno of the **Corruptors**' might! The opening moments were a whirlwind, as **Bullion Iglesias** of **The Ebon Gate Corruptors** made a magnificent dash, only to be brought down by a punishing tackle from **Rhett Gavrilla** of the **Commanders**—a mighty blow! The action kept grinding, with **Ahasuerus An** weaving through the treacherous ground, dodging sudden depressions in the field, until she sliced through the defense and SCORED! Halftime provided a brief respite, but the violence merely simmered! In the second stanza, **Pirozzo Opal** of **The New Ravenfall Commanders** answered back with a phenomenal shoot from the thick ooze, earning their two points! But the **Corruptors** responded with devastating power! After the break, **Napoleon Anzovin** managed to fight his way forward, propelled by sheer will, and drove the leather head clean through the goal for the defining touchdown! While **The New Ravenfall Commanders** managed to keep the ball alive, ending the contest with **Jessalin Zobias** in possession, it was too little, too late! **The Ebon Gate Corruptors** prove once again that they are the kings of this chaotic carnival! What a performance by **As Utter**, who utilized his massive Greatsword to simply *dominate* the field! And **Bullion Iglesias** kept throwing cannonballs while stuck in the sludge! A mighty, glorious, corruption-fueled victory for **The Ebon Gate Corruptors**! They have reset the bracket, folks, and they have done it with demonic flair! The heroes of the realm can take their accolades, but tonight, the glory belongs to the lords of the muck, and oh, how glorious they are!**
